issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1390: remaining Python asset sweep 10/10

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1390 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `c5450aef`.
The lane rebased onto `origin/main` at `ea03f42d` after push contention on `origin/main`.
Final published lane commit is `aa3a8e52` on `origin/BIG-GO-1390`.
Repeated fast-forward pushes to `origin/main` were rejected because the shared branch kept advancing during this lane.
